title: Operations Coordinator
schedule: Standard weekday schedule with occasional early morning coordination needs
responsibilities: Coordinate customer onboarding and job scheduling across office and field teams
Maintain CRM workflows, follow-up tasks, and documentation standards
Support reporting, process updates, and cross-functional execution
requirements: 2+ years of operations, customer coordination, or workflow support experience
Comfort with CRM systems, documentation, and process improvement
Ability to manage handoffs between sales, service, and leadership
leadershipSignals: Clear reporting line to the operations manager
ambiguitySignals: Some process cleanup still in progress
